metadata.name: bonding_curve
metadata.description: On-chain bonding curve AMM with Raydium graduation â€” pump.fun model for AI agent tokens.

instructions.name: accept_admin
docs: Accept a pending admin transfer.
The pending admin (set via update_config) calls this to complete the two-step transfer.

accounts.name: pending_admin
docs: The new admin â€” must match config.pending_admin

instructions.name: buy
docs: Buy tokens with SOL.
sol_amount: total SOL to spend (fees deducted before curve calc)
min_tokens_out: slippage protection â€” revert if fewer tokens received

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault â€” receives SOL payment

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault â€” sends tokens to buyer

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: Buyer's token account (ATA)

accounts.name: referrer
docs: Optional referrer who earns a share of the platform fee.

instructions.name: claim_all_platform_fees
docs: Batch claim platform fees across multiple pools in a single transaction.
Treasury signs once; remaining_accounts contains [pool, sol_vault] pairs.

instructions.name: claim_creator_fees
docs: Claim accumulated creator fees from a pool.
Only the token creator can call this.

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault â€” fees are paid from here

instructions.name: claim_platform_fees
docs: Claim accumulated platform fees from a pool.
Only the treasury wallet can call this.

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault â€” fees are paid from here

instructions.name: claim_raydium_fees
docs: Claim Raydium creator fees from a graduated pool.
Fees are split 50/50 between token creator and platform treasury.
Either the creator or treasury can trigger this.

accounts.name: pda_token_0_account
docs: PDA's agent token ATA â€” receives fees from Raydium CPI

accounts.name: pda_token_1_account
docs: PDA's WSOL ATA â€” receives fees from Raydium CPI

instructions.name: close_graduated_pool
docs: Close a graduated pool's accounts and reclaim rent to treasury.
Pool must be graduated and have all fees claimed; token vault must be empty.
Only admin or treasury can call.

accounts.name: caller
docs: Caller â€” must be admin or treasury

accounts.name: pool
docs: Pool account â€” closed at instruction exit (rent â†’ treasury)

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault â€” drained to treasury during handler

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault â€” closed via SPL CPI during handler

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint for this pool

accounts.name: treasury
docs: Treasury â€” receives all reclaimed rent and remaining SOL

instructions.name: create_token
docs: Create a new token with bonding curve pool.
Mints total supply, creates pool, sets up metadata,
revokes freeze/mint/metadata authorities.
Optional dev_buy_sol for creator's initial buy.

accounts.name: mint
docs: The SPL token mint â€” created here

accounts.name: pool
docs: Bonding curve pool PDA

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault PDA (holds real SOL from trades)

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault (holds pool's tokens)

accounts.name: metadata
docs: Metaplex metadata account

accounts.name: metadata_program
docs: Metaplex Token Metadata program

accounts.name: creator_token_account
docs: Creator's token account (ATA) â€” needed for dev buy

instructions.name: graduate
docs: Graduate pool to Raydium CPMM.
Permissionless â€” anyone can call once threshold is reached.
Remaining tokens + accumulated SOL migrate to Raydium.
LP tokens are burned (liquidity permanently locked).

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault â€” remaining tokens transferred to Raydium

accounts.name: mint
docs: The token mint

accounts.name: payer_agent_ata
docs: Payer's ATA for the agent token â€” funded from token_vault before Raydium CPI

accounts.name: payer_wsol_ata
docs: Payer's WSOL ATA â€” SOL wrapped here before Raydium CPI

accounts.name: raydium_program
docs: Raydium CPMM program

accounts.name: raydium_amm_config
docs: Raydium AMM config

accounts.name: raydium_pool_state
docs: Raydium pool state â€” created by CPI

accounts.name: raydium_authority
docs: Raydium authority PDA

accounts.name: raydium_token_0_vault
docs: Raydium token 0 vault â€” created by CPI

accounts.name: raydium_token_1_vault
docs: Raydium token 1 vault â€” created by CPI

accounts.name: raydium_lp_mint
docs: Raydium LP mint â€” created by CPI

accounts.name: lp_token_account
docs: Payer's LP token ATA â€” created by Raydium CPI (payer pays rent as creator)
We burn LP tokens from here immediately after graduation.

accounts.name: raydium_observation
docs: Raydium observation state

accounts.name: create_pool_fee
docs: Raydium create pool fee receiver

accounts.name: wsol_mint
docs: WSOL mint

accounts.name: raydium_permission
docs: Raydium Permission PDA (Path A only; pass any account for Path B)

instructions.name: initialize
docs: Initialize the global curve config â€” called once per deployment.

instructions.name: migrate_config
docs: One-time migration: realloc CurveConfig to accommodate new fields.
Call once after deploying v2. Remove in a future cleanup deploy.

accounts.name: config
docs: on the undersized account.

accounts.name: pool
docs: on undersized/mis-sized accounts.

instructions.name: sell
docs: Sell tokens for SOL.
token_amount: tokens to sell
min_sol_out: slippage protection â€” revert if less SOL received (after fees)

accounts.name: sol_vault
docs: SOL vault â€” sends SOL to seller

accounts.name: token_vault
docs: Token vault â€” receives tokens from seller

accounts.name: seller_token_account
docs: Seller's token account

accounts.name: referrer
docs: Optional referrer who earns a share of the platform fee.

instructions.name: toggle_referrals
docs: Toggle referrals on/off for a specific token.
Only the token creator can call this.

instructions.name: update_config
docs: Update global config.
Only admin can call this. Fee changes don't affect existing pools retroactively.
Setting new_admin initiates a two-step transfer â€” the new admin must call accept_admin.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only admin can perform this action

errors.name: CreationPaused
errors.msg: Token creation is currently paused

errors.name: PoolNotActive
errors.msg: Pool is not active â€” trading disabled

errors.name: AlreadyGraduated
errors.msg: Pool has already graduated to Raydium

errors.name: NotReadyToGraduate
errors.msg: Pool has not reached graduation threshold

errors.name: SlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Slippage tolerance exceeded

errors.name: InsufficientSol
errors.msg: Insufficient SOL for this trade

errors.name: InsufficientTokens
errors.msg: Insufficient tokens for this trade

errors.name: ZeroAmount
errors.msg: Zero amount not allowed

errors.name: MathOverflow
errors.msg: Math overflow

errors.name: InvalidFees
errors.msg: Invalid fee configuration â€” total fees cannot exceed 1000 bps (10%)

errors.name: InvalidThreshold
errors.msg: Invalid graduation threshold â€” must be greater than 0

errors.name: NoFeesToClaim
errors.msg: No fees available to claim

errors.name: NameTooLong
errors.msg: Token name too long (max 32 chars)

errors.name: SymbolTooLong
errors.msg: Token symbol too long (max 10 chars)

errors.name: UriTooLong
errors.msg: Metadata URI too long (max 200 chars)

errors.name: InvalidSupply
errors.msg: Invalid total supply â€” must be greater than 0

errors.name: InvalidDecimals
errors.msg: Invalid decimals â€” must be between 0 and 9

errors.name: ExceedsPoolBalance
errors.msg: Buy would exceed remaining tokens in pool

errors.name: ExceedsRealSol
errors.msg: Sell would exceed real SOL in pool

errors.name: CreatorMismatch
errors.msg: Creator mismatch â€” only the token creator can perform this action

errors.name: NotGraduated
errors.msg: Pool has not graduated â€” Raydium fees only available post-graduation

errors.name: NoRaydiumFees
errors.msg: No Raydium creator fees to claim

errors.name: TradingPaused
errors.msg: Trading is currently paused

errors.name: NoPendingAdmin
errors.msg: No pending admin transfer

errors.name: NotPendingAdmin
errors.msg: Only the pending admin can accept the transfer

errors.name: UnclaimedFees
errors.msg: Pool still has unclaimed fees â€” claim all fees before closing

errors.name: VaultNotEmpty
errors.msg: Token vault is not empty

errors.name: DevBuyExceedsMax
errors.msg: Dev buy exceeds maximum allowed (50% of graduation threshold)

errors.name: SelfReferral
errors.msg: Self-referral not allowed â€” referrer cannot be the trader

errors.name: ReferralsDisabled
errors.msg: Referrals are not enabled for this token

errors.name: ReferralFeeExceedsPlatform
errors.msg: Referral fee exceeds platform fee â€” must be <= platform_fee_bps

fields.name: admin
docs: Admin who can update config

fields.name: treasury
docs: Treasury wallet that receives platform fees

fields.name: creator_fee_bps
docs: Creator fee in basis points (e.g. 140 = 1.4%)

fields.name: platform_fee_bps
docs: Platform fee in basis points (e.g. 60 = 0.6%)

fields.name: graduation_threshold
docs: SOL amount (lamports) at which graduation triggers

fields.name: total_supply
docs: Total supply for all tokens created (raw units, e.g. 1B * 10^9)

fields.name: decimals
docs: Token decimals

fields.name: initial_virtual_sol
docs: Initial virtual SOL reserve (lamports)

fields.name: paused
docs: Whether new token creation is paused

fields.name: raydium_permission_enabled
docs: Whether Raydium permission-based graduation is available.
When true: uses `initialize_with_permission` (enables creator fees on Raydium).
When false: uses standard `initialize` (no post-graduation creator fees).
Admin toggles this after getting whitelisted by Raydium.

fields.name: tokens_created
docs: Total tokens created through this config

fields.name: tokens_graduated
docs: Total tokens graduated to Raydium

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: trading_paused
docs: Whether trading (buy/sell) is paused â€” emergency kill switch

fields.name: pending_admin
docs: Proposed new admin (two-step transfer). Pubkey::default() = no pending transfer.

fields.name: referral_fee_bps
docs: Referral fee in basis points, carved from platform fee (e.g. 50 = 0.5%)
Must be <= platform_fee_bps. When a valid referrer is present, this amount
is deducted from the platform's share and sent directly to the referrer.

fields.name: mint
docs: The SPL token mint

fields.name: creator
docs: Token creator

fields.name: virtual_sol_reserve
docs: Current virtual SOL reserve (lamports) â€” includes initial virtual + real deposits

fields.name: virtual_token_reserve
docs: Current virtual token reserve (raw units)

fields.name: real_sol_balance
docs: Real SOL deposited by buyers (lamports) â€” this is what accumulates toward graduation

fields.name: real_token_balance
docs: Real tokens remaining in the pool (raw units)

fields.name: total_supply
docs: Total supply minted at creation

fields.name: status
docs: Pool status

fields.name: creator_fees_earned
docs: Creator fees accumulated (lamports)

fields.name: creator_fees_claimed
docs: Creator fees already claimed (lamports)

fields.name: platform_fees_earned
docs: Platform fees accumulated (lamports)

fields.name: platform_fees_claimed
docs: Platform fees already claimed (lamports)

fields.name: dev_buy_sol
docs: Dev buy tracking â€” SOL spent by creator

fields.name: dev_buy_tokens
docs: Dev buy tracking â€” tokens received by creator

fields.name: created_at
docs: Timestamp of pool creation

fields.name: graduated_at
docs: Timestamp of graduation (0 if not graduated)

fields.name: raydium_pool
docs: Raydium pool address after graduation

fields.name: raydium_lp_mint
docs: LP token mint from Raydium

fields.name: lp_tokens_locked
docs: LP tokens locked (held by our program, not burned)

fields.name: raydium_fees_claimed_token_0
docs: Raydium creator fees claimed (token 0 cumulative)

fields.name: raydium_fees_claimed_token_1
docs: Raydium creator fees claimed (SOL/WSOL cumulative)

fields.name: total_volume_sol
docs: Total volume in SOL (lamports)

fields.name: total_trades
docs: Total number of trades

fields.name: name
docs: Token name (for reference)

fields.name: symbol
docs: Token symbol (for reference)

fields.name: uri
docs: Metadata URI

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump for pool PDA

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump for sol vault PDA

fields.name: referrals_enabled
docs: Whether referrals are enabled for this token (creator opt-in)

fields.name: referral_fees_paid
docs: Total referral fees paid out (lamports)
